first_eight_rollout_policy.downstream_gates_trusted_after: refreshed rolling-caption rough proof receives human keep, then final assembly keep, then publish-readiness keep

caption_context.placement: middle two-thirds of fixed right rail
caption_context.displayed_caption_source: script-locked cue text from locked narration script; ASR/timed text is timing-only
caption_context.final_render_behavior: burn visible rail captions into video frame after human keep
caption_context.publish_sidecar_behavior: preserve approved VTT sidecar for YouTube upload

full_timeline.embedded_caption_sample_policy: proof injects script-locked display chunks into the predecessor rough proof; full caption script match must be refreshed before keep

key_phrase_spans.phrase_text: precisely the kind of evolutionary missing link
accepted for forty-one years
not because the evidence was strong
already prepared to believe
fit this model precisely
cost of the alternative was high
exactly what was needed
taken as evidence that it was real
social cost of sustained public skepticism
pattern of inconsistencies was never assembled
story outran the quality of the evidence
provenance was not independently controlled
evidentiary basis had become almost invisible
systematic analysis using microscopy
institutional will to demand investigation
forger is less significant than the question
already disposed to accept it
right credentials, at the right moment
lenses were not designed to ask
Forty-one years is not evidence of stupidity
institutional belief can do
evidence was too good to be true

living_cover_cue_map.missing_reviewed_key_phrase_span_policy: suppress highlight rendering and keep packet pending/tighten until authored reviewed spans exist
living_cover_cue_map.draft_key_phrase_span_policy: draft spans may render in rough review only and remain pending human keep before final/publish gates
living_cover_cue_map.render_policy: internal production artifact only; no visible cue-map cards or diagnostic labels

rail_behavior.viewer_text_boundary: all viewer-facing story/chapter/caption/effect/end-screen text stays inside fixed right rail unless a human-approved override scopes another surface

rolling_caption_window.placement: middle two-thirds of fixed right rail
rolling_caption_window.source: script-locked cue chunks with timing-only ASR/VTT/SRT alignment
rolling_caption_window.motion: single translateY as deterministic continuous audio/render-time function

end_screen_context.rolling_caption_end_screen_policy: YouTube placeholders fade in during the final caption exit and are fully visible when final caption text is suppressed

next_review_question: Create publish-readiness package and upload an unlisted YouTube review; public release remains manual.

youtube_upload_request.reason: Final MP4 has been created for review. Long-form gate requires publish-readiness package keep and explicit upload approval before YouTube upload.
